description: Full CRUD for school management, fix zone/item delete toast behavior, show access code instead of ID on school cards
steps: STEP 1 - Update GET /api/schools to support include_codes=true query param that returns access_code field
STEP 2 - Create /api/schools/[id]/route.ts with PUT (update name+access_code) and DELETE handlers
STEP 3 - Fix confirmDeleteZone to separate delete and refresh into distinct try/catch blocks
STEP 4 - Fix confirmDeleteItem to separate delete and refresh into distinct try/catch blocks
STEP 5 - Update SchoolManagementSection: fetch with include_codes, show access_code instead of ID, add Edit and Hapus buttons with inline edit form and delete confirmation
acceptance_criteria: PUT /api/schools/[id] updates school name and access_code
Zone delete shows success toast even if refresh fails
Item delete shows success toast even if refresh fails
School cards show access code instead of ID
School cards have Edit and Hapus buttons
Edit opens inline form to change name and access_code
findings: All three issues implemented. Build and lint pass. (1) GET /api/schools supports include_codes=true param, (2) New /api/schools/[id]/route.ts with PUT+DELETE, (3) confirmDeleteZone and confirmDeleteItem use separate try/catch blocks, (4) SchoolManagementSection shows access codes, supports inline edit and delete with confirmation.
